untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options pricing data (implied volatility of specific strikes, call option prices at different strikes, gamma and delta Greeks). The backtest engine only supports equity price and technical indicators. Options IV surface comparisons, gamma neutrality calculations, and delta-hedged position construction cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, historical volatility, and bar properties). Requires: (1) IV term structure data, (2) options Greeks (gamma, delta), (3) multi-leg options spread pricing mechanics.
translation_notes: Signal MCMILLAN_DRY_409 is an advanced volatility arbitrage strategy using a calendar spread / skew trade (long ATM calls, short OTM calls, short delta-hedging stock). This is fundamentally an options strategy that cannot be reduced to equity price action rules. Would require a dedicated options backtester with IV, Greeks, and multi-leg position tracking.
